basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the JIPMER Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (M.Sc./M.V.Sc./M.Tech. or equivalent) in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Molecular Biology, Biomedical Sciences, Physiology, Microbiology, Genetics, Zoology, or related disciplines with at least 55% marks, National Eligibility Test qualification (CSIR-UGC NET, GATE or equivalent national level exam)
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree (M.Sc./M.V.Sc./M.Tech. or equivalent) in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Molecular Biology, Biomedical Sciences, Physiology, Microbiology, Genetics, Zoology, or related disciplines with at least 55% marks. Candidates must have qualified for any National Eligibility Test such as CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship and GATE. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.

selection_process: CV and documents Interview (in-person or videoconferencing)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download JIPMER Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: A postgraduate degree in Life Sciences or related disciplines with at least 55% marks and a valid National Eligibility Test qualification (CSIR-UGC NET, GATE, etc.) is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37000+HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42000+HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a shortlisting process from applications and CVs, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is JIPMER located?
faq.answer: JIPMER is located in Puducherry, with the pincode 605006.
